justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot 2.6.4 to 3.3.13, Java 11 to 21, and migrates javax.* imports to jakarta.* (validation, persistence). It also updates the MySQL connector artifact and adds the required flyway-mysql dependency. The use of @Serial for serialVersionUID and HttpStatusCode in the exception handler shows good Java 21/Spring Boot 3 idioms. No spurious churn is present.
